base_annual_fee.source_clause: Annual O&M Fee of INR 5,20,00,000 (Five Crores Twenty Lakhs only) per annum, billed monthly at INR 43,33,333 on or before the 5th of each month.

base_monthly_fee.source_clause: Monthly fee of INR 43,33,333 payable by the 5th of each month.

escalation.source_clause: Annual escalation at WPI All Commodities for January, effective April 1, capped at 6% per annum.

variable_component.source_clause: Variable cleaning and maintenance charge at INR 0.018 per net kWh exported to grid, billed monthly.

availability_guarantee_pct.source_clause: Panel availability guarantee of 97.0% per annum. Availability = (Available DC Capacity Hours / Installed DC Capacity × 8760) × 100.

ld_rate_per_pp.source_clause: LDs at 1.5% of Annual O&M Fee per PP shortfall below 97.0% availability guarantee. Cap at 15% of Annual Fee.

ld_cap_pct.source_clause: Maximum annual LD liability capped at 15% of the Base Annual O&M Fee.

bonus_threshold_pct.source_clause: Performance incentive of 1.0% of Annual Fee per PP above 98.5% availability. Maximum 5% of Annual Fee per annum.

bonus_rate_per_pp.source_clause: Incentive rate 1.0% of Annual O&M Fee per percentage point of availability above 98.5%.

payment_terms_days.source_clause: Net 30 days payment terms from invoice date.

late_payment_interest.source_clause: Overdue payments carry simple interest at SBI Base Rate + 2% p.a.

renewal_notice_months.source_clause: 12 months written notice required for contract non-renewal.

validation_warnings: RISK: Escalation cap is only 6% — if WPI exceeds 6%, vendor will absorb additional cost risk.
NOTE: Variable rate INR 0.018/kWh is significantly lower than wind O&M rates.
